testcase.name: test_has_new_summary_fields

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_55_alloc_targets.py:66: in test_has_new_summary_fields assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_daily_rows_have_suggested
